name: Title: Homemade Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE YEAST, WATER, AND SUGAR IN A LARGE MIXING BOWL-MIX WELL.
2. ADD BUTTER, EGG, SALT, AND 3 CUPS FLOUR-MIX UNTIL SMOOTH CONTINUE TO MIX IN THE FLOUR UNTIL MIXTURE STIFFENS.
3. ROLL INTO A BALL OR LOG.
4. WRAP IN PLASTIC AND CHILL FOR 4-24 HOURS.
5. DIVIDE DOUGH INTO 36 PORTIONS.
6. ROLL EACH PIECE INTO AN 18-INCH ROPE.
7. FORM INTO A PRETZEL SHAPE, PRESSING ENDS TO SEAL.
8. PLACE ONTO A PARCHMENT-LINED BAKING SHEET.
9. REPEAT WITH REMAINING DOUGH.
10. COMBINE YOLK AND WATER-MIX WELL.
11. BRUSH OVER PRETZELS.
12. COVER AND ALLOW TO RISE FOR 30-45 MINUTES.
13. BAKE AT 400 DEGREES FOR 10-15 MINUTES.
14. DIP IN SALT AS DESIRED.
15. SERVE WARM, WITH MUSTARD TO THE SIDE.
